name: Chicken'n' Vegetable Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 10-oz pkg. frozen peas and carrots, cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan.
2. Gradually add flour to the melted butter and whisk until smooth.
3. Slowly incorporate chicken broth while whisking continuously.
4. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens.
5. Add seasoning salt and mushroom soup to the sauce.
6. Stir in peas, carrots, pimentos, and chopped onion.
7. Saute green pepper in butter until tender.
8. Combine all ingredients into a greased casserole dish.
9. Prepare potatoes according to package instructions.
10. Top the casserole with mashed potatoes using a pastry tube.
11. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes.
Yield: 10 servings.
